title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen and all fans of the Twinkle
Series, it's the moment you've all been waiting
for!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The ultimate race, known to all of Umamusume-kind—the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... This year's race is bound to be a blast too.
The atmosphere alone has me stoked to the max!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...We've finally made it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Very much so. But at the same time... I'm
exhilarated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm aching to get out onto the turf and show
everyone what the me of the moment can do.
choice_data_list: I knew I could count on you.
I knew I could count on you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no, it's you whom I've been counting on, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you—for everything you've done for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You encouraged me to surpass my limits, and
after all the support and guidance you've given
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Nothing would bring me greater joy than to win
you the title of Derby trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I shall be going now.
choice_data_list: Go give it all you've got!
Go give it all you've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ramonu's little sister... She might be a
strong contender. She's about to run in the
Derby, but she doesn't look nervous at all!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Nahhh, you gotta focus on those two!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I see that you'll both pose a fine challenge!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'm losing to anyone... not today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With these two legs... with the fleeting time
afforded me... let me become a star that shines
ever on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I will race with every ounce of my being!
